text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Smart Falcon is training intensely in
preparation for the Satsuki Sho, it doesn't seem
to be bearing fruit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks to Silence Suzuka, who is making a
name for herself on turf, for help.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka wows audiences with both her
running and singing. In Smart Falcon's eyes, she is
the very image of perfection.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon's training session with Silence
Suzuka further strengthens her resolve to take on
the Satsuki Sho.
